name: github-actions-failure-debugging
description: Guide for debugging failing GitHub Actions workflows.

To debug failing GitHub Actions workflows in a pull request:
	1.  Check recent workflow runs and their status.
	2.  Review logs from failed jobs.
	3.  If needed, inspect the full workflow run logs.
	4.  Reproduce the failure locally if possible.
	5.  Fix the issue and confirm the workflow passes before committing.
